name: Microwave Doggie Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat flour, cornmeal, dry milk, shortening, quick-cooking oats, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the slightly beaten egg and bouillon granules to the mixture.
3. Gradually add hot water while stirring until the dough comes together.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
5. Roll out the dough to about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut the rolled dough into your desired shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place the biscuits on a microwave-safe plate, making sure they are not touching each other.
8. Microwave at half power for 5 to 10 minutes, rotating the plate halfway through cooking time.
9. Remove the plate from the microwave and let it cool completely before serving.
These biscuits will keep in an airtight container for a few days but tend to disappear quickly!
